name: Samsung 990 PRO PCIe 4.0 x4 7450MB/s M.2 Nvme SSD – 2TB
highlights: Up to 7,450 MB/s read and 6,900 MB/s write speeds.
Samsung Elpis controller and V-NAND 3-bit MLC.
Compatible with Windows 10+, Linux, and PS5 (with adapter).
